name: @aqua/plugin-portal-export
description: Aqua portal export-to-repo plugin — generator that materializes a Live client's content into clients/<slug>/ as a self-contained Next.js app. Plugins, brand kit, portal variants, content all collected from foundation port reads. Idempotent re-export preserves operator hand-edits. 4 preset starter portals (skincare-brand / service-portal / membership-only / affiliate-only). Per architecture extension §19b.
